results.question: What does NeuralRays AI say about outcomes?
results.answer:
Neural Rays AI develops artificial intelligence and data-driven software solutions. The company focuses on AI and digital services, ethical AI, data analysis, agile delivery, and lean product development to help clients build transformational digital products and outcomes.

Most relevant page: About Us – NeuralRays AI
Source: https://neuralrays.ai/about-us

results.question: What does About Us - NeuralRays AI say about the organisation and its team?
results.answer:
The Neural Rays About Us page lists its core team as:
- Rajkumar Srinivasan, Solutions Director
- Balaji Kalidhasan, Technical Lead
- Satish Namburi, Solutions Director
- Hemkumar Lakshminarayanan, Technical Director
- Thilagavathi Ravikumar, Finance Executive
- Anirban Bose, Product Director
- Iswarya Selvam, QA Lead
- Srinivasan B Kada, CBO
- Senthil Loganathan, CEO
- Sathiyan Sivaprakasam, DevOps Architect

Most relevant page: About Us – NeuralRays AI
Source: https://neuralrays.ai/about-us

results.question: What AI services or capabilities are described in AI Services - NeuralRays AI?
results.answer:
Neural Rays offers several AI services, including:
- Data Strategy Consulting
- Data Science and AI Consulting
- AI Solution Development / Custom AI Development
- AI-Driven Automation

These services are focused on helping organisations build data strategies, use AI effectively, develop AI-powered solutions, and automate repetitive tasks.

Most relevant page: AI Services – NeuralRays AI
Source: https://neuralrays.ai/ai-services

results.question: What contact or location information is provided in Contact Us - NeuralRays AI?
results.answer:
You can contact Neural Rays by emailing Hello@NeuralRays.AI. The website says they are based in Chennai, India; Dubai, UAE; and London, UK, and serve clients globally.

Most relevant page: Contact Us – NeuralRays AI
Source: https://neuralrays.ai/contact

results.question: What digital services or capabilities are described in Digital Services - NeuralRays AI?
results.answer:
Neural Rays lists three main Digital Services:
- Product and Platform Engineering
- Cloud Transformation
- Digital Assurance

These services cover software/platform development, cloud adoption, application modernisation, quality assurance, digital testing, and AI-led test automation.

Most relevant page: Digital Services – NeuralRays AI
Source: https://neuralrays.ai/digital-service

results.question: What case studies or success stories are described in Success Stories - NeuralRays AI?
results.answer:
Neural Rays lists several success stories, including:
- Risk Management Software Platform
- Digital Banking Platform
- Geriatric Care Platform
- Blockchain-Based Digital Health Platform
- Asset Tracking and Inventory Management System
- Oil and Gas Analytics
- AI-Based Vehicle Assembly Line Defect Detection
- Retail Macro and Micro Space Optimisation

Most relevant page: Success Stories – NeuralRays AI
Source: https://neuralrays.ai/success-stories
